title: Othiri Othiri Swapnangal
subTitle: Varsha, a young woman with a heart full of dreams, is burdened by societal stigma and mental health challenges; her life intertwines with Shivananda, a fearless journalist who fights against corruption.

subTitle: Archana, a lawyer, acts as guardian to her three younger brothers in their village joint family. Having sacrificed her marriage for them, life takes a turn when her ex-husband remarries.

title: King Liar
subTitle: Satyanarayanan, who has an uncanny talent for deception, falls in love with Anjali, an aspiring model. To win her over, he promises to help her secure work with India's top fashion design company.

title: Feminichi Fathima
subTitle: A Malayalam satirical drama about Fathima, a homemaker in conservative Ponnani, Kerala, whose quiet rebellion against patriarchal norms begins when she tries to replace a stained mattress, turning this simple act into a symbol for her struggle for dignity, autonomy, and self-liberation within her stifling domestic life, all portrayed with humor and warmth.

title: Adam Joan
subTitle: Adam goes to Scotland when he learns that some people have kidnapped Ila, his daughter. Upon digging deeper, he realises that the kidnappers are Satan worshippers with plans to sacrifice Ila.
